tools.name: chat
tools.description: Send a chat completion request to the confidential LLM. Returns reproducible AI inference results with full attestation metadata including model, quantization, seed, and TEE environment details.

messages.description: JSON array of message objects with role and content fields

tools.name: complete
tools.description: Send a text completion request to the confidential LLM. Completes a given prompt with reproducible inference metadata.

tools.name: models
tools.description: List available models on this confidential AI instance.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Check the health status and reproducibility configuration of this confidential AI instance. Returns model, quantization, TEE type, and image digest.

tools.name: load_model
tools.description: Load a model into the confidential AI instance. The model can be a local directory name (e.g. gemma-4-31b-it) or a HuggingFace repo (e.g. google/gemma-4-31b-it). Returns 202 Accepted with loading status.

model.description: Model name: local directory (e.g. gemma-4-31b-it) or HuggingFace repo (e.g. google/gemma-4-31b-it)

dtype.description: Data type for model weights (auto, bfloat16, float16, float32)

tools.name: model_status
tools.description: Check model loading status. Returns state (idle, loading, ready, failed), progress, elapsed time, and error details.

tools.name: unload_model
tools.description: Unload the current model and stop vLLM. Frees GPU memory so a different model can be loaded.

tools.name: readiness
tools.description: Check if the instance is ready to serve inference requests. Returns 200 when a model is loaded, 503 otherwise.
